public_reputation: Known around Lantern Docket through day-to-day work as faith-culture liaison.
manner: Treats custom as live infrastructure and corrects social missteps before they harden into offense. In Lantern Docket, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of faith-culture liaison in and around Lantern Docket, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Lantern Docket workable through the obligations of faith-culture liaison while managing the immediate pressure of backlog pressure, misclassification.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of faith-culture liaison credible while absorbing the strain created by backlog pressure, misclassification.

adventure_hooks.summary: Caira Coilspire can draw the party into a locality problem centered on faith-culture liaison duties in Lantern Docket.
Caira Coilspire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with backlog pressure, misclassification around Lantern Docket.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Caira Coilspire is immediately readable as a faith-culture liaison tied to Lantern Docket.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Lantern Docket: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Caira Coilspire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a faith-culture liaison and the daily pressures of Lantern Docket.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a faith-culture liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Lantern Docket harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Caira Coilspire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a faith-culture liaison too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain expected conduct and turn cultural knowledge into safe passage or trust.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Caira Coilspire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Caira Coilspire always knows more about Lantern Docket than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a faith-culture liaison in Lantern Docket.
